programme.title: BATTLES
programme.desc: EPIC airsoft battle round 3!! Even more balloons, even more pops!

programme.title: BATTLES
programme.desc: Catching fish as big as CARS!! Our biggest fishing video ever!

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Brendan Gleeson is Murray, a once proud fisherman who now, along with his former colleagues in the harbour of Tickle Head are out of work and forced to live off welfare.

programme.title: Lucky Numbers
programme.desc: Russ Richards, a TV weatherman and local celebrity who's on the verge of losing his shirt. What money he doesn't squander on his own lavish lifestyle he loses in an unsuccessful snowmobile dealership he owns.

programme.title: Freshman Year
programme.desc: Lonely college freshman Alex has closed himself off from his peers, who all appear to have this whole "college thing" figured out. But everything changes one night when Alex takes a leap and attends a legendary frat party, where he forges a strong connection with Maggie.

programme.title: The Captor
programme.desc: Fact is stronger than fiction in this furiously thrilling crime caper based on the absurd but true story of the 1973 bank heist and hostage crisis, starring Ethan Hawke and Noomi Rapace and from the executive producer of BlackKkKlansman.

programme.title: Renegade: Hard Rain
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: An ex-CIA agent and his estranged daughter are forced on the run when his employers erase all records of his existence, and mark them both for termination as part of a wide-reaching international conspiracy.

programme.title: Daughter of the Wolf
programme.desc: An ex-military specialist comes home when her father passes away. But after getting news that she has inherited a large sum of money, her son is kidnapped. Instead of seeking help, she captures one of the kidnappers, using him to track down her son.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Academy Award winner Adrien Brody star as warriors battling over the lucrative Silk Road in this epic action adventure.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory.

programme.title: Under Still Waters
programme.desc: A handsome stranger meets a young married couple and begins to make their lives a living hell.

programme.title: The Last Scout
programme.desc: After the earth is destroyed by war, a scout team of astronauts searches the universe for an inhabitable place to save the human race.

programme.title: Seraphim Falls
programme.desc: The American Civil War has ended but Colonel Morsman Carver (Neeson) is on one final mission: to kill Gideon (Brosnan) no matter what it takes. Launched by a gunshot and propelled by rage, the relentless pursuit takes them both far from the comforts and codes of civilisation, into the bloodiest recesses of their own souls.

programme.title: Destined At Christmas
programme.desc: Two people meet on Black Friday, get separated, and yearn to reunite—if only they knew each other's last names and numbers. Can destiny help them find each other by Christmas?

programme.title: A Crafty Christmas Romance
programme.desc: Mandy, the owner of a craft and hobby store, discovers an old copy of “A Christmas Carol” among donations for a book and toy donation drive. In the book is a letter to Santa from 70 years ago and a valuable coin. Mandy sets out to find the owner of the book, letter and coin with the help of Jonah, a contractor who first came upon and donated the book. Along the way, they find clues that lead them closer to the author, and to each other, but can Mandy return everything to the book owner in time for Christmas and make her own Christmas wish come true?

programme.title: The Gift Of Christmas
programme.desc: Christmastime at the home of George and Denise Barnett look festive, but all is not well - George is worried about a friend and Denise over the Christmas concert at their church. Solutions don't come easily but on Christmas Eve everyone is reminded of the true gift of Christmas.

programme.title: Hot Chocolate Holiday
programme.desc: Colette runs a coffee shop that is home to her secret and famous hot chocolate recipe. She finds herself in competition with Marcus, the kind, new dessert shop owner who draws her customers away with his own specialty hot chocolate. Colette thinks he stole her recipe but she gives him a chance when his store suffers damage from a fire and has to close. Colette works together with him to repair his shop but it might not be enough to get him back on his feet in time for Christmas. It will, however, help Colette see Marcus in a different light, especially as she learns the source of his hot chocolate recipe. Love, hot chocolate and an unexpected connection will bring Marcus and Colette together for the holidays.

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands
programme.desc: An avenging outsider riddles a gang of ruthless bandits in revenge for the murder of his family.

programme.title: Find a Place to Die
programme.desc: An outcast Confederate soldier redeems himself by defending a woman against bandits willing to kill for her goldmine claim.

programme.title: Killer Goodbye
programme.desc: A young man goes back to his hometown ten years after killing the killer of his parents. Once there he is asked to help the sheriff.

programme.title: Pawnee
programme.desc: Pale Arrow is a white man raised since a boy by the Pawnee Chief. With wagon trains now encroaching on Pawnee land, the Chief sends Pale Arrow to be with the white people.

programme.title: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: A young female attorney with ambition to make partner in her law firm, falls for an opposing attorney on a big important case. Will love prevail?

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: Olympic Dreams
programme.desc: In this heart-warming romantic comedy, an athlete and volunteer form an unexpected bond at the Olympic Games.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Emma Lloyd has a hit radio talk show, an impending book deal, and a loving relationship with her fiancé, Richard. Then Emma finds out that she is already married to a man she's never met before, a result of a misguided prank. With her wedding just around the corner, Emma must find the mystery man and obtain an annulment.

programme.title: Escape Plan 3: The Extractors
programme.desc: After security expert Ray Breslin is hired to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a Hong Kong tech mogul from a formidable Latvian prison, Breslin's girlfriend is also captured.

programme.title: The Sailor Who Fell from Grace with the Sea
programme.desc: After his father dies, a disturbed young boy plots to take revenge on the new man in his mother's life.

programme.title: Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Hilarity, romance and festive spirit prevail, when six New Yorkers get trapped in an elevator on Christmas Eve! Forcing a heartless real estate tycoon, a crass HR manager, his ex-employee and a cynical doctor to reconsider the way they think about others.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Who can she trust?

programme.title: The Pilgrim
programme.desc: The Tramp is an escaped convict who is mistaken as a pastor in a small town church.

programme.title: Il Bidone
programme.desc: Aging small-time con man Augusto, who swindles peasants, works with two younger men: Roberto, who wants to become the Italian Johnny Ray.

programme.title: The Immigrant
programme.desc: Charlie is an immigrant who endures a challenging voyage and gets into trouble as soon as he arrives in America.

programme.title: Toll Bar
programme.desc: Rauan works at a parking lot in a prestigious residential area. Aidar passes him daily in his luxurious car. The auto belongs to his father, who works in the oil business. Rauan and Aidar are both determined to build their own lives themselves. They live in the same city, their paths cross in the same yard, but there is an abyss between them. They are separated by a toll-bar between wealth and poverty. One day Aidar and Rauan will clash and their worlds will clash. What will the results be..?

programme.title: The Boat
programme.desc: Buster and his family go on a voyage on his homemade boat that proves to be one disaster after another.

programme.title: Banjo Farid
programme.desc: Farid, 12 years old, is an enigma to others. Quiet and original, he seems to be experiencing daily life without feeling any emotion. However, one day, against all expectations, he will change thanks to an improbable musical instrument.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a brilliant mother and daughter con team who have their gift down to a fine art.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: Two highly skilled martial arts warriors must train an American teen so that he is able to fight a centuries old battle to free the Monkey King.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, Tom Sizemore and Thomas Jane star in the harrowing tale of real life American heroes shipwrecked in shark infested waters in the waning days of World War II.

programme.title: Sum of Histories
programme.desc: Two physicists discover how to manipulate electrons with quantum tunneling to send emails to the past. With the power to influence the recent past, the temptation to right old wrongs is too great.

programme.title: Errors of the Human Body
programme.desc: When a potentially lethal virus is created within his new lab, Dr Geoff Burton is shocked to discover he is not only the unwitting cause, but also its first victim.

programme.title: The Unseen
programme.desc: A man who abandoned his family now risks everything to find his missing daughter, including exposing the secret that he is becoming invisible.

programme.title: Narcopolis
programme.desc: 2022: London. The world's economic outlook is still precarious and to appease a restless population the authorities have decriminalised all classes of recreational drugs. The ‘Drecks' are an elite unit created by an over-stretched police force to keep the black market dealers off the streets and the licensed drug companies rich.

programme.title: Christmas on the Bayou
programme.desc: A divorced workaholic executive goes back to her home town to spend Christmas with her son and mother. Through a rekindled romance and a small miracle, she discovers where her heart truly belongs.

programme.title: Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: Due to a road closure, eight strangers must take refuge in an abandoned church during a storm.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A lawyer is riding high after putting a receiving a Not Guilty verdict for her client, but has to look over her shoulder when a woman she meets in a traffic accident is not all she appears to be.

programme.title: Despite the Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: Comet
programme.desc: Comet explores the six-year relationship between Dell and Kimberly, as it skips around between five pivotal moments.

programme.title: Extract
programme.desc: From the director of ‘Office Space', and ‘Beavis and Butthead do America', and starring the downright hilarious Jason Bateman, comes a comedy about sexual frustration, litigation, con-artistry, and castration…

programme.title: After the Reality
programme.desc: The life of a contestant (Matthew Morrison) on a Bachelorette style reality show is thrown into turmoil when the sudden death of his father forces him to quit the series prematurely and reconnect with his estranged sister at the family cabin.

programme.title: W.E
programme.desc: The affair between King Edward VIII and American divorcée Wallis Simpson and a contemporary romance between a married woman and a Russian security guard.
A man who specialises in debunking paranormal occurrences checks into fabled room 1408 in the Dolphin Hotel.

programme.title: A Christmas Horror Story
programme.desc: For some folks in the small town of Bailey Downs, Christmas turns into something much less festive.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: A businesswoman is pursued by a psychopath after being locked in a parking garage on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: 13 Sins
programme.desc: Elliot is bright but meek, drowning in debt and desperate because he's about to marry the love of his life.

programme.title: A Christmas Horror Story
programme.desc: For some folks in the small town of Bailey Downs, Christmas turns into something much less festive.

programme.title: The Magic Reindeer: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Niko the Reindeer enjoys his cool and carefree life in the Arctic, but that all changes when he is given his most surprising Christmas present ever - a little stepbrother named Jonni! Niko is unhappy about this new addition to the family, but when Jonni is kidnapped by eagles, Niko realises that it's down to him to fly off and rescue his brother!

programme.title: Christmas at the Ranch
programme.desc: When Haley Hollis returns to her family ranch, she wasn't banking on spending so much time with with ranch hand Kate - or falling for her.

programme.title: Christmas Couple's Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples attend a retreat to strengthen their respective relationships under the guidance of a famed therapist. But as the holiday season unfolds, unexpected challenges arise when the therapist must confront some feelings of her own, and sparks fly when one couple's son unexpectedly falls for the charming retreat manager. Will this festive getaway reignite these couples' love, or will it lead them down an entirely new path?

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: As Jesus begins his journey out of the wilderness following forty days of fasting and praying, he struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis. This powerful drama depicting an imagined chapter from Jesus' life stars Golden Globe winner Ewan McGregor (Trainspotting, Star Wars franchise), Academy Award nominee Ciarn Hinds (Belfast, Game of Thrones), and Tye Sheridan (Mud, X-Men franchise).

programme.title: Christmas Miracle (2014)
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in the sleepy town of Rockford when Sheriff Rick Langston (Dean Cain, Lois & Clarke: The New Adventures of Superman) arrests a mysterious man who resembles Santa Claus. However, when the townspeople's Christmas wishes all start to come true, the sheriff begins to wonder if this jolly old man just might be the real deal. It is when he is out of love and luck and at his most cynical that the sheriff meets Lucy (Christine Lakin, Valentine\s Day) and is shown the miracle of love and family. As Christmas Day fast approaches, new relationships are forged and existing ties are strengthened in this uplifting festival story for the whole family.

programme.title: Last Chance for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa's handsome but beleaguered stable master John must rush off to Alaska.

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Crooks and cops chase siblings with fake cash in Canada. Stars Matthew Knight.

programme.title: Steppin' Into the Holiday
programme.desc: Billy returns to his hometown and helps revive the town's Christmas Eve show.

programme.title: Last Chance for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa's handsome but beleaguered stable master John must rush off to Alaska.

programme.title: Forget Everything and Run
programme.desc: The Walking Dead meets The Revenant. When a virus ravages a mountain community the survivors must flee from the monsters it created into the barren wilderness. Scavenging, freezing and dying, one family will fight for their lives against marauders hellbent on revenge. As humanity clings to hope, their only chance for survival is forming an alliance with the monsters that came calling.

programme.title: Resistance: 1942
programme.desc: A tense, WWII-set cat and mouse thriller starring Cary Elwes (The Princess Bride), Greer Grammer (Awkward.), Jason Patric (Sleepers) and Oscar nominee Judd Hirsch (Independence Day). France, 1942. Under Nazi control, the Allies have been pushed off and Hitlers victory is nearly absolute. In hiding, Jacques radio broadcasts a message of hope. But a relentless Gestapo captain is out to catch him.

programme.title: Redwood
programme.desc: Breakout film at Frightfest Festival and a must-watch for all horror fans! Josh and Beth visit a secluded national park for some quality time. Ignoring the advice of the Park Rangers, they venture off trail and come face to face with Redwood's legendary wildlife. A fresh spin to a well-worn mythology, creating an edge-of-your seat movie to shred your nerves and make you think twice about camping.

programme.title: Haunt
programme.desc: A terrifying and engaging, possession horror about a family who have recently moved into a cursed house, which had caused the death of the previous family to occupy it. A frightening and powerful character-driven haunted-house horror, starring Jacki Weaver (Silver Linings Playbook), Harrison Gilbertson (Need for Speed) and Liana Liberato (The Best of Me).

programme.title: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: Eric is known for being a Christmas grouch. But will his neighbour and young relatives teach him to embrace the prospect of love and the spirit of Christmas? Jesse Metcalfe stars. (2017)

programme.title: Double Holiday
programme.desc: Work rivals Rebecca and Chris are forced to collaborate when they are tasked with organising this year's holiday season office party. Stars Carly Pope and Kristoffer Polaha. (2019)

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Planner
programme.desc: While planning her cousin's lavish wedding, Kelsey Wilson's world is turned upside down when a Private Investigator shows up. Starring Jocelyn Hudon (2017)

programme.title: Christmas in the Highlands
programme.desc: A New York sales manager falls in love with the handsome Earl she meets in the Scottish Highlands. Starring Dan Jeannotte (2019)

programme.title: My Sweet Holiday
programme.desc: Sadie agrees to teach the new owner of her parents' shop everything she knows about chocolate, but what she didn't expect was to fall in love with him. Starring Malone Thomas (2020)

programme.title: Baking All The Way
programme.desc: A pastry chef arrives in Wisconsin to convince a baker to give her his gingerbread recipe for her new cookbook. Starring Cory Lee (2022)

programme.title: As Gouda As It Gets
programme.desc: Cheesemaker Brie is perfecting smoked gouda to enter the annual cheese festival. Cheese blogger Jack is writing an article on her journey. (2020)

programme.title: A Christmas Recipe For Romance
programme.desc: Abby asks a renowned chef to teach her to cook ahead of a Christmas cookery competition that could save her family's historic inn. Could love be on the menu? Starring Madeline Leon. (2019)

programme.title: A Christmas To Savour
programme.desc: Scarlett, chef and co-owner of a restaurant, is bereft of inspiration for her Christmas menu. Will a trip to a cooking retreat reignite her passion for work and romance? Stars Britt Irvin (2021)

programme.title: As Gouda As It Gets
programme.desc: Cheesemaker Brie is perfecting smoked gouda to enter the annual cheese festival. Cheese blogger Jack is writing an article on her journey. (2020)

programme.title: ACCOUNT RENDERED
programme.desc: Robert suspects his wife is being unfaithful and decides to follow her. He sees her meet a man, but after falling unconscious, he wakes up to discover she has been murdered. But who killed her? Everyone is under suspicion in this tense thriller.

programme.title: ON THE NIGHT OF THE FIRE
programme.desc: Kobling is a barber who steals ¬£100 to pay off his wife's debt. When the police trace the stolen notes to him, and someone is killed, Kobling goes into his hiding and sends his wife and child away. Will he be able to elude the police?

programme.title: THE DARK MAN
programme.desc: A peaceful seaside village is shocked by a sudden and vicious double murder when a beautiful young actress informs the police that she may able to identify the killer.

programme.title: DOCTOR AT SEA
programme.desc: Simon sets off for the sea aboard a steamship where he encounters eccentric characters.

programme.title: DOCTOR IN LOVE
programme.desc: Sir Lancelot Spratt gives his medical students a slating to remember over a patient. The patient is Dr Richard Hare, a student who has fallen ill with jaundice and, in love with the enticing Night Nurse!

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: It is South Carolina, and the spirit of 1776 fills the air throughout the thirteen American colonies. Rebellion is brewing, taxation from the British crown is taking a toll on the American colonists, and a conflict with England is inevitable.

programme.title: Savage Justice
programme.desc: Newly engaged Shelby John (Jack Huston) and Ruby Red want a fresh start after their struggles with addiction, but when Shelby discovers his beloved Ruby dead on their porch, he embarks on a vengeful killing spree of the dealers who supplied her.

programme.title: Get a Job
programme.desc: Miles Teller, Anna Kendrick, and Bryan Cranston star in this fresh and wickedly funny comedy about getting a job in a tough economy. Recent college graduates Will (Teller) and Jillian (Kendrick) quickly encounters the struggles millennials face in today's highly competitive job market.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: The Shepherd
programme.desc: A texas cop battles ex-navy seals who are trying to traffic drugs from Mexico into the USA.

programme.title: Chappie
programme.desc: Chappie tells the story of a robot imbued with artificial intelligence who is stolen by two local gangsters who want to use him for their own nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Silent Rage
programme.desc: A crazed man who has killed a number of people with an ax is arrested by the small town's sheriff, Dan Stevens. But this is no ordinary psycho, and he breaks the handcuffs and heads for the hills. The sheriff finds that he must destroy this murderous killer who has been made indestructible through genetic engineering.

programme.title: Roxanne
programme.desc: Inspired by Cyrano de Bergerac, the comic story of a man with the heart of a great lover, the soul of a poet, and the nose for trouble.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: A heartwarming and turbulent story of three outcasts coping with the frustrations of life in New York City. Starring Jack Nicholson as a world-weary curmudgeon and Greg Kinnear as a gay artist who share a living space in the same building with Helen Hunt, the waitress who changes both their lives. AS GOOD AS IT GETS also stars Academy Award-winner Cuba Gooding, Jr.

programme.title: Booty Call
programme.desc: BOOTY CALL is a wild comedy about a double date turned upside down and inside out. Two over-eager young men Jamie Foxx and Tommy Davidson are kept solidly at arm's length by their dates, performed to comic perfection by Tamala Jones and Vivica A. Fox. Young men minding their manners have never been so much fun!

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: Ex-felon, Eugene Brown, establishes a Chess Club for inner city teenagers in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: Driven to expose corporate crimes and government secrets no matter what the cost, an activist and computer hacker team up to become the underground watchdogs of the privileged and powerful.

programme.title: Stonewall
programme.desc: As Danny and his friends experience discrimination, endure atrocities and are repeatedly harassed by the police, we see a rage begin to build.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: Brothers tells the powerful story of two siblings, thirty-something Captain Sam Cahill and younger brother Tommy Cahill, who are polar opposites.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time.

programme.title: Last Looks
programme.desc: Last Looks is a pacy and star-studded homicide mystery set in the heart of Hollywood. Alistair Pinch (Mel Gibson), is an eccentric but successful actor who spends his days drunk living the high-life in Hollywood. When his wife is found dead he becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: Two cops, a rookie and a grizzled vet, pursue an accomplished bank robber.

programme.title: American Siege
programme.desc: An ex-NYPD officer-turned-sheriff of a small rural Georgia town has to contend with a gang of thieves who have taken a wealthy doctor hostage.

programme.desc: Vevo Christmas

programme.title: Christmas Party
programme.desc: Timeless Christmas crackers to soundtrack your celebrations!

programme.desc: Bringing the best in entertainment.

programme.title: Festive Favourites

programme.title: A Rockin' Christmas
programme.desc: Turn up the volume for these rock and indie Christmas songs.

programme.title: Pop Christmas
programme.desc: Season's greetings from the biggest pop stars around.

programme.title: Soft Pop

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Untangled
programme.desc: Diya, a gully badminton player, meets Arjun, a former badminton champ from an affluent family, who resents his own kin. Will Diya bring back the much-needed positivity and hope in Arujns life?

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Deserts On The Move
programme.desc: Deserts On The Move - Europe: Most school textbooks continue to recite the conventional wisdom that Europe does not have any deserts. They are out of date. Portugal, Spain, Italy and Greece are four EU countries that are already so badly affected that they have joined the United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (CCD).

programme.title: The Colors of the Desert
programme.desc: The Colors of the Desert - The Yellow Sahara: The yellow Sahara is the postcard image of a desert. A waving sea of sand. Passing dunes. Date palms oases breaking up the onerous journey. A Fata Morgana mirage appears in the distance. Like no other desert, the Sahara embodies the romantic ideal and lost dream of the infinite – a dream which persistently influenced occidental culture in the 19th century.

programme.title: The Colors of the Desert
programme.desc: The Colors of the Desert - The Gray Mojave: The Gray Mojave in California is an endless, rutted and mountainous landscape with vast gravel fields and little sand. A desert whipped to roughness by the wind. Its pale gray can become intensely dark, or, chameleon-like, change its hue to match the varying seasons or daylight.

programme.title: The Colors of the Desert
programme.desc: The Colors of the Desert - The Pink Wadi Rum: Jordan's pink-hued Wadi Rum is a jewel among deserts: rocky and coarse, but saturated with fine pink sand. The “Valley of the Moon,” as the Wadi is also called, is a stone amphitheater set under a pale gray sky. As astronauts have observed, though the landscape is terrestrial, the panorama is more reminiscent of the Moon's surface.

programme.title: The Colors of the Desert
programme.desc: The Colors of the Desert - The White Uyuni: The white Salar de Uyuni in Bolivia is an unusual, indeed utterly unique desert, where Earth and Sky appear to flow and fuse together in a fantastic fashion. It astonishes with its surreal, well-nigh otherworldly appearance – especially at the end of the rainy season when a light sheeting of water overlays its surface the interplay of light and color doubles the visible world in the truest sense of the word.

programme.title: Scandinavia's Hidden Paradises
programme.desc: Scandinavia has always been a place of longing. Once covered by a kilometre-thick layer of ice, more than 100,000 years ago a mighty giant rose from the sea in the north of Europe, whose immense nature continues to fascinate people today. The Scandinavian Peninsula and the surrounding Nordic countries impress with numerous superlatives: the largest continental glacier, the deepest fjord in Europe, four UNESCO World Natural Heritage sites and more than 200,000 islands in Sweden alone.

programme.title: Expedition Wallacea
programme.desc: 150 years ago Alfred Wallace used his observations on Indonesian islands to develop a theory of evolution independently of Darwin's. Now Matthias Kopfmüller's team want to add to Wallace's work: can the undersea evidence explain what Wallace found on land? What Wallace had recognised is that within a single island group there seemed to be a barrier that species could not pass.

programme.title: A Reggae Session

programme.title: Horse Power: American Legacies
programme.desc: American horses are icons. Mustang. Morgan. Appaloosa. Quarter Horse. Even their names suggest a timeless power. Horsepower that shaped a nation. A nation whose demands shaped them. Each has a unique story to tell. Born of legendary historical moments, charismatic figures, and singular places, HORSE POWER takes us on a journey tracing the emergence of these breeds over time. But the work to understand, create, and maintain their legacies is not over. Today's horse trainers are as diverse as the horses they care for. Their passion is unbridled – for they continue in the long tradition of innovation and husbandry that is now part of the very fabric of America.

programme.title: Flight for Survival
programme.desc: In the last decade, 99.9% of the population of Asian vultures has disappeared, but its unlovable reputation has kept its plight out of the public eye. Scott Mason hit upon the idea of combining his lifelong love of falconry with the extreme sport of paragliding and thus invented parahawking - flying with his rescued and rehabilitated Egyptian vultures.

programme.title: Wild Christmas
programme.desc: Donkeys, reindeer, robins: Christmas tradition, symbolism and history are full of characters from the natural world.

programme.title: Magical Fjords
programme.desc: Fjords are one of the most dramatic landscapes on Earth. But for all their beauty and majesty, the surface spectacle is just the tip of the iceberg.

programme.title: Ice Dogs
programme.desc: Conditions in the High Arctic are too extreme for either man or dog to survive alone but together we have become native to the vast white expanses. Here dogs became our greatest allies. They're our eyes, ears, strength and stamina our closest connection to a wild and unforgiving nature. In this magical yet unforgiving land, the enduring bond between human and canine goes beyond friendship to total mutual dependence. As one of the oldest breeds in the world, Greenland dogs are celebrated as the pinnacle of high performance and endurance in polar regions.

programme.title: Hippo River
programme.desc: For many, hippos are the quintessential animal of the African waterways. All other creatures, from elephants to crocodiles, benefit from cohabiting with hippos. It's not just massive hippos that steal the show, their pint-sized cousins are just as incredible

programme.title: Horse Power: American Legacies
programme.desc: American horses are icons. Mustang. Morgan. Appaloosa. Quarter Horse. Even their names suggest a timeless power. Horsepower that shaped a nation. A nation whose demands shaped them. Each has a unique story to tell. Born of legendary historical moments, charismatic figures, and singular places, HORSE POWER takes us on a journey tracing the emergence of these breeds over time. But the work to understand, create, and maintain their legacies is not over. Today's horse trainers are as diverse as the horses they care for. Their passion is unbridled – for they continue in the long tradition of innovation and husbandry that is now part of the very fabric of America.

programme.title: Lunenburg: Where the Land Meets the Sea
programme.desc: On the east coast of Canada, a place whose name sounds strangely familiar. The small town of Lunenburg, west of Halifax, was founded in 1753 by North German immigrants. Today, the idyllic town with its many wooden houses is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. In the 19th century, Lunenburg was one of the richest towns in the British Empire, becoming prosperous through fishing and shipbuilding. Glenn Rhodenizer's family traces back ten generations directly to German immigrants. And what the Rhodenizers primarily grow on their fields directly by the sea could hardly be more typical: it is white cabbage, which the farming family processes into sauerkraut. Sauerkraut can be found in every restaurant and supermarket in this area it is the specialty of the region. The heritage of wooden boat building is successfully maintained by David Westergard. In his ancient shed, he is assembling a 20-meter schooner from four different types of local wood. Building wooden boats, he says, is like "slow food": sustainable, conscious, environmentally friendly, waste-free.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Jersey: the Channel Island is one of the areas in the UK that can boast the most hours of annual sunshine. Not that Dave Cowburn cares very much. He works in the dark, cool ducts of an old bunker from the Sec-ond World War. Here, he breeds turbot, and is very successful at it, too. The "Jersey Royal", the regal potato, has been grown on the island since 1880, fertilized with seaweed from the surrounding ocean. In the third generation, Christine Hellio manages approximately 20 hectares on the coast. "The potato is our most important export commodity", she says. It is harvested by hand, as machines cannot be used on the steep fields. The price is quite regal, too: One kilogram costs 6 Euros. Hugh Gill is one of around 240 voluntary police officers on Jersey. The Honorary Police is regarded as the oldest organised police system in the world. Hugh works for them for one week every month. On the green lanes, the streets of Jersey, the speed limit is 15 miles per hour. Jersey has an immense tidal range and with up to 13 metres difference, it is the world's third largest. This is good for a rarity: the Ormer - one of the world's most expensive species of snail.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: In Newfoundland, at the easternmost tip of North America, the landscape is pristine, dramatic, and very sparsely populated. In summer, icebergs occasionally drift along the steep cliffs. When the "Titanic" collided with an iceberg and sank just 300 miles off the coast of Newfoundland in 1912, the last radio messages were picked up in a small wooden hut on the Avalon Peninsula. Today, most Newfoundlanders live on Avalon. There are particularly many seabirds here. In Witless Bay, the newborn puffins are ready for their first descent into the Atlantic. But some stray onto the coastal road, attracted by the lights of the hotels and restaurants. In doing so, they run the risk of being run over. A team of volunteers saves the lives of countless young birds: The Puffin & Petrel Patrol goes out at night dressed in high-visibility vests to collect the puffins. Biologist Sabrina Wilhelm then brings them back to Green Island, home to the largest puffin colony in North America. Here, the birds catch up on what they should have done long ago: the first dive of their lives.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Gigantic fjords and over 5,000 small islands: In Alaska's south there's a lot of wilderness and little civilization. The region between the capital Juneau and the Canadian border is also known by locals as the "Last Frontier", the last outpost. Michelle Masden, for example, has come to terms with the harsh conditions here. She is the only seaplane pilot in the region. She earns her living with her 65-year-old Beaver: as an air taxi, transport plane and now and then as a rescuer in last necessity. Michelle flies anything and everything: spare parts and food, doctors, hikers and hunters. For the fishermen of southern Alaska she searches for large shoals of fish and guides the captains to the next good catch. Ray Rusaw was a car mechanic by profession, but in his old age he was gripped by gold fever. With a self-built special raft and a highly creative selection of equipment from the DIY store, he sets off in search of the precious metal that his predecessors overlooked two centuries ago. For four years he has been happily obsessively combing through sandbanks and river courses. For Ray, the search for gold has little to do with luck and much to do with meticulous research. He is certain that he has found the perfect spot.

programme.title: Cuba to Go
programme.desc: Ever since the embargo was lifted in the summer of 2015, Cuba's popularity has been steadily increasing.

programme.title: North America's National Parks
programme.desc: North America's National Parks are world famous and their breathtaking landscapes fascinate millions of visitors. This spectacular series will show you what happens beyond the lookouts. Everglades National Park is an American national park that protects the southern twenty percent of the original Everglades in Florida. The park is the largest tropical wilderness in the United States, and the largest wilderness of any kind east of the Mississippi River. An average of one million people visit the park each year. Everglades is the third-largest national park in the contiguous United States after Death Valley and Yellowstone. UNESCO declared the Everglades & Dry Tortugas Biosphere Reserve in 1976, and listed the park as a World Heritage Site in 1979, while the Ramsar Convention included the park on its list of Wetlands of International Importance in 1987. Everglades is one of only three locations in the world to appear on all three lists. (S1 E05)

programme.title: North America's National Parks
programme.desc: Great Smoky Mountains National Park is an American national park in the southeastern United States, with parts in Tennessee and North Carolina. The park straddles the ridgeline of the Great Smoky Mountains, part of the Blue Ridge Mountains, which are a division of the larger Appalachian Mountain chain. The park contains some of the highest mountains in eastern North America, including Clingmans Dome, Mount Guyot, and Mount Le Conte. The border between the two states runs northeast to southwest through the center of the park. The Appalachian Trail passes through the center of the park on its route from Georgia to Maine. With 12.5 million visitors in 2019, the Great Smoky Mountains National Park is the most visited national park in the United States. (S1 E06)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight'. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World's Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada). (S4 E06)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer's Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt'? (S4 E07)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia). (S4 E08)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven't given up yet. (S4 E09)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland (S4 E10)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines (S4 E11)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let's see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage. (S4 E12)
